page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.32xlarge is a general-purpose instance powered by the KVM hypervisor and built on the x86_64 architecture. It features 128 dedicated physical cores with 128 vCPUs, utilizing Intel Xeon 8369B processors operating at a base frequency of 2.7 GHz. The instance is configured with 512.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware, requiring external block storage for operating system and application data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers between instances and cloud services.

Given its high core count and balanced memory-to-CPU ratio, the ecs.g7.32xlarge offers a high-density resource profile suitable for enterprise workloads. It is designed for applications requiring substantial parallel processing capabilities without the need for specialized GPU acceleration. Appropriate workloads include large-scale web serving, enterprise application hosting, distributed databases, and containerized microservices.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.32xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose instance featuring 128 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores running at 2.7 GHz. It is equipped with 512.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-memory ratio of 4.0 GB per core. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage. It provides a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps to support high-throughput network operations. The high-density, multi-core architecture makes it highly suitable for demanding enterprise workloads, large-scale web serving, container orchestration, and distributed database deployments that require significant parallel processing capabilities without specialized hardware acceleration.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.32xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 128 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 512 GB of RAM, and 64 Gbps baseline network bandwidth on a KVM hypervisor without local storage.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.32xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 128 Intel Xeon cores, 512 GB RAM, and 64 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: A high-density, multi-core platform offering balanced compute and memory resources with high-speed networking for demanding enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 128 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B cores running at 2.7 GHz
512.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core
